concerns.text: T010 marked [P] but shares code/descriptors/compute.py with T011-T014. Multiple tasks modifying the same file cannot run in parallel - violates producer-consumer ordering within the same task group.
T022 marked [P] but modifies code/models/train.py which T020 also implements. Same-file modification conflict - T022 (class weighting/SMOTE) must follow T020 (base training implementation).
T008, T009 marked [P] but spec states 'Write these tests FIRST, ensure they FAIL before implementation'. Tests should precede T010-T014 implementation, not run parallel with them.

T037 modifies scripts/filter_labels.py (created by T018), T038 modifies results/performance_metrics.json schema (created by T021), T033 refactors code/descriptors/utils.py (created by T012). These must be ordered AFTER their respective producer tasks complete.
T026, T027, T029 depend on trained models from T020 (US2) but cross-phase dependency not explicitly marked. Add 'Depends on: T020' to clarify US3 cannot start until US2 training complete.
